channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Tecno’s latest concept phone is lit by neon
item.description: After teasing a magnetic, modular smartphone concept the other day, Tecno has followed that up with another two phone designs centered around color-changing finishes: one with E Ink, and the other...

item.title: Here are a few options, from most direct to more story-driven: **Option 1 (Recommended):** Solved: From Dart to TypeScript: ...
item.description: 🚀 Executive Summary TL;DR: A Dart developer’s streaming JSON parser in TypeScript, using event-emitter callbacks, is not idiomatic for modern TS. The article guides transitioning from...

item.title: Did that actually help? Evaluating AI coding assistants with hard numbers
item.description: You are building a Skill, an MCP server, or a custom prompt strategy that is supposed to make an AI coding assistant better at a specific job. You make a change. The next session feels smoother....

item.title: How to Hash Passwords in Python and Encrypt Sensitive Data the Right Way
item.description: You’re building your first serious application, a chat app, a password manager, maybe even an e-commerce platform. Everything looks solid until someone asks: “How are user passwords stored?”...

item.title: Parsing Nutrition Labels with AI: From Image to Structured Data
item.description: The rise of health-conscious consumers and digital wellness tools has fueled a growing demand for accurate, structured nutrition data. Whether you're building a calorie tracker, a diet-friendly...

item.title: A maze to solve when you're bored
item.description: I was bored so I decided to make this little game for other programmers who might be in the same predicament. Ever had those moments when you're just tired of reading logs on your black screen...

item.title: Preocupado com os riscos da IA ao executar comandos? Descubra as proteções de segurança do TRAE
item.description: 01 TRAE: Segurança e Confiança como Pilares do seu IDE Com a evolução exponencial dos modelos de IA e das capacidades dos Agentes, os assistentes de programação tornaram-se "copilotos"...

item.title: Lesser-Known but Powerful Vue Features
item.description: Vue is often praised for its simplicity and clean API. Most developers are familiar with: ref() reactive() computed() watch() v-if / v-for But Vue also includes several lesser-known features that...

item.title: TRAE Skills: Potencialize sua IA com Módulos de Especialização
item.description: O TRAE acaba de lançar as Skills (Beta), agora totalmente integradas ao modo SOLO. Construídas sob o padrão aberto de Agent Skills, elas permitem encapsular instruções, scripts e recursos em um...

item.title: Caching Strategies That Will Make Your App 100x Faster
item.description: Caching is the single most impactful optimization you can make. Here's a practical guide to caching strategies, patterns, and pitfalls. Why Cache? A database query takes 5-50ms. A cache hit takes...

item.title: Building RoomLink: A Community-Driven Housing Platform for Nigerians
item.description: This is a submission for the DEV Weekend Challenge: Community The Community RoomLink was built for students, young professionals, NYSC members, and working-class Nigerians who struggle to find...

item.title: Vivo’s next phone will launch with a professional camera rig
item.description: Vivo rarely has a presence at MWC, but this year it bucked that trend in a big way, with the reveal of its next flagship phone, the X300 Ultra, alongside an upgraded telephoto extender lens and...

item.title: Qualcomm’s new chip is geared toward wearable AI gadgets
item.description: Like it or not, more AI wearables may be on the horizon - or at least Qualcomm seems to think so. Today the company announced its new Snapdragon Wear Elite chip. At a press briefing, Qualcomm said...

item.title: The Motorola Razr Fold is shaping up to be pure flagship
item.description: Motorola has revealed a little more about its upcoming folding phone, and all signs point toward a premium option - not the budget-friendlier alternative the category could use. For starters, the...

item.title: A robot arm with puppy dog eyes is just one of Lenovo’s new desktop AI concepts
item.description: Alongside a handful of new laptop concepts (and a range of real products too), Lenovo used MWC to announce a pair of AI-based productivity companion concepts. Both are standalone desk devices...

item.title: The new Yoga 9i 2-in-1 from Lenovo has an angled ‘canvas mode’ for easier note-taking
item.description: Lenovo has a few new Yoga laptops it's announcing at MWC 2026: the 14-inch Yoga Slim 7i Aura Edition, 15-inch Yoga Pro 7a, and 14-inch Yoga 9i 2-in-1 Aura Edition. The most interesting of the pack...

item.title: Lenovo’s redesigned ThinkPad Detachable tablet has a bigger screen and legit keyboard
item.description: Lenovo is announcing five new ThinkPads and a new ThinkBook laptop for MWC 2026. There are various new chip offerings and updates for this swathe of ThinkPads, but the device I find the most...

item.title: Lenovo made a Framework-like laptop with modular ports — and a second screen
item.description: One of Lenovo's big laptop concepts for MWC 2026 is a modular ThinkBook with two screens. Officially called the ThinkBook Modular AI PC Concept, the proof-of-concept is a 14-inch productivity...

item.title: This Windows gaming handheld has a screen that folds in half
item.description: Lenovo put a foldable display on a gaming handheld. The Legion Go Fold Concept is a Windows-based handheld with a flexible POLED display, detachable Joy-Con-like controllers, and a folio case to...

item.title: Portable Sonos Play speaker leaks on Canadian Best Buy
item.description: An unannounced Sonos speaker called Play has been spotted on the Canadian Best Buy site. The Sonos Play looks like a slightly shrunk-down version of the Move 2 with a loop on the back for toting...

item.title: Google looks to tackle longstanding RCS spam in India — but not alone
item.description: Google is integrating carrier-level filtering into RCS in India through a partnership with Airtel to strengthen protections against spam.

item.title: OpenAI reveals more details about its agreement with the Pentagon
item.description: By CEO Sam Altman’s own admission, OpenAI’s deal with the Department of Defense was “definitely rushed,” and “the optics don’t look good.”

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude rises to No. 1 in the App Store following Pentagon dispute
item.description: Anthropic’s chatbot Claude seems to have benefited from the attention around the company’s fraught negotiations with the Pentagon.

item.title: SaaS in, SaaS out: Here’s what’s driving the SaaSpocalypse
item.description: What's behind the SaaSpocalypse? It simply seems a new supreme has risen.

item.title: The trap Anthropic built for itself
item.description: Anthropic, OpenAI, Google DeepMind and others have long promised to govern themselves responsibly. Now, in the absence of rules, there's not a lot to protect them.

item.title: The billion-dollar infrastructure deals powering the AI boom
item.description: Here's everything we know about the biggest AI infrastructure projects, including major spending from Meta, Oracle, Microsoft, Google, and OpenAI.

item.title: ClawJacked Flaw Lets Malicious Sites Hijack Local OpenClaw AI Agents via WebSocket
item.description: OpenClaw has fixed a high-severity security issue that, if successfully exploited, could have allowed a malicious website to connect to a locally running artificial intelligence (AI) agent and...

item.title: OpenAI’s Sam Altman announces Pentagon deal with ‘technical safeguards’
item.description: OpenAI's CEO claims its new defense contract includes protections addressing the same issues that became a flashpoint for Anthropic.

item.title: Our agreement with the Department of War
item.description: Details on OpenAI’s contract with the Department of War, outlining safety red lines, legal protections, and how AI systems will be deployed in classified environments.

item.title: Who is the Kimwolf Botmaster “Dort”?
item.description: In early January 2026, KrebsOnSecurity revealed how a security researcher disclosed a vulnerability that was used to assemble Kimwolf, the world's largest and most disruptive botnet. Since then,...
